title: Custom Hand-Coded
text: Built by hand, with none of the templates or plugin bloat that weigh Wix and WordPress down. Just lean code shaped around your venue, so nothing slows it down.

title: Optimised Page Speed
text: Google found 53% of mobile visitors abandon a site that takes longer than three seconds to load. Yours loads in around 1.5s, so the people who find you stick around to book.

title: Mobile First Design
text: Most diners decide where to eat on their phone, so every site is designed for the small screen first and scaled up from there. Sharp, fast, and effortless to book on, regardless of the device.

title: SEO Foundations
text: Clean code, proper page structure, meta tags, and a sitemap, built in from day one. It's the on-page groundwork most hospitality sites get wrong, and it's what gives you a real shot at ranking when locals search for “best restaurant in Melbourne”.

title: Built to Convert
text: A fast, good-looking site is only half the job. Every page is built to move diners toward one thing, booking a table. Clear menus, obvious buttons, and your booking link never more than a tap away.

title: Designed Around You
text: Your booking system, menu, socials, and Google profile, all connected in one place. A diner can see your menu, check your hours, and book a table without ever leaving the page.
